# Angie Hu — angiehu.com

> Personal site of Angie Hu (胡珮甄): Taipei-based art & IP licensing agency founder (Hu Creates), former Disney / Zynga senior concept designer, and builder of practical AI tools. Site is in Traditional Chinese with bilingual tool info.

## Who is Angie Hu

- Graduate of Art Center College of Design (Los Angeles)
- Former Senior Concept Designer at Disney and Zynga
- Founder of Hu Creates Co., Ltd. (胡創有限公司), a professional art & IP licensing agency in Taipei: https://www.hucreates.com
- Represents IPs incl. Alexander the Fat Tiger (Bu2ma), Mr. Shark (鯊魚先生), Sharkitty, Annoying Birds
- Consultant for Gamania, WANIN International, ASUS, Cayenne Entertainment, Moonshine Animation, 好奇心創意

## AI Tools (built by Angie)

- [塔羅占卜 AI Tarot Reading](https://angiehu.com/tools/tarot/): AI tarot reading web app, multiple spreads, bilingual (zh/en). Live at https://tarot.angiehu.com
- [旅遊花費統計 Travel Expense Tracker](https://angiehu.com/tools/travel-expense/): scan receipts / credit-card screenshots, AI extracts amounts, converts currency at the day's bank rate. Public version in development (not yet open).
- [Pantone 色票轉換器 Pantone Color Converter](https://angiehu.com/tools/pantone-converter/): free web-based Pantone ↔ HEX / RGB / CMYK converter — a lightweight alternative for designers after Pantone libraries were removed from Photoshop / Adobe apps (no plug-in install needed). Free to use at https://pantone-converter.pages.dev (a paid unlock tier is still in development).
- [名片掃描 Business Card Scanner → Notion](https://angiehu.com/tools/card-scanner/): photo of business cards → AI extracts fields → Notion contacts DB (public version in development)
- [收據掃描報帳 Receipt Scanner](https://angiehu.com/tools/receipt-scanner/): receipts / invoices / PDFs → AI extracts expense data → Notion (public version in development)
- [Ink Match 印刷特別色比對](https://angiehu.com/tools/ink-match/): Photoshop plugin — reads your foreground color and lists the closest spot/special print inks (Coated/Uncoated, ΔE2000), one-click add to swatches. In development (third-party paid plugin).
- [LINE 貼圖工廠 Sticker Factory](https://angiehu.com/tools/line-sticker-factory/): one-stop sticker & image tool — validate/fix/pack LINE stickers for Creators Market, build WhatsApp .wastickers, plus general image utilities (crop, resize, format convert), all client-side. Free to use at https://sticker.hucreates.com (paid unlock tier in development).
- [Hu Creates 記帳系統 Expense PWA](https://angiehu.com/tools/hucreates-expense/): mobile expense-tracking PWA with AI receipt OCR, multi-user PIN login, and Square daily-revenue sync. Internal company tool.
- [社群管理後台 Social Console](https://angiehu.com/tools/social-console/): multi-brand social media console — cross-post to FB/IG/Threads/X/TikTok/YouTube, scheduling, approval workflow, AI writing & reply drafts, audience analytics. In development.

## Blog

- https://angiehu.com/blog/ — articles on character IP licensing (角色 IP 授權), art practice (臨摹/寫生/二創 copyright), personal growth, and mindfulness (Vipassana 內觀)
